name: CWT 4 - Kenya Gazette Campaign Finance Scraper & RAG

nodes.name: Schedule - Every 12 Hours
nodes.notes: Polls news.kenyagazette.co.ke Gazette Notices section every 12 hours for campaign financing notices — funding disclosures, spending reports, donor declarations, IEBC compliance.

nodes.name: Fetch Gazette Notices Page
nodes.notes: Fetches the Gazette Notices category page — the main listing of all gazette notices on news.kenyagazette.co.ke. Timeout 60s.

nodes.name: Search Campaign Finance
nodes.notes: Searches news.kenyagazette.co.ke for 'campaign finance' using the site's built-in search (?s=). Returns articles/notices matching the search term directly by title.

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM t1 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM t2

nodes.name: Merge Both Pages
nodes.notes: Combines results from both the Gazette Notices category page and the campaign finance search results into a single stream for the Code node to parse.

nodes.name: Extract Gazette PDF Links
nodes.notes: Scans every <a> link and <h1>–<h4> heading on the page. Checks the VISIBLE TITLE TEXT of each notice (not the URL or filename) for campaign finance keywords: 'campaign finance/fund', 'election fund', 'spending limit/return', 'expenditure return', 'donor disclosure', 'contribution return', 'party financing', etc. Only notices whose title matches are followed.

nodes.name: Download Gazette PDF
nodes.notes: Downloads the gazette PDF/page content. For binary PDFs, n8n will extract text if the Extract PDF Text community node is installed, otherwise raw text is used.

nodes.name: Generate Embedding via Replicate
nodes.notes: Set HTTP Header Auth credential: Name=Authorization, Value=Bearer <REPLICATE_API_TOKEN>. Uses GTE-large embedding model.

nodes.name: Store Chunk in CWT
nodes.notes: Posts each embedded chunk to Frappe CWT app via the n8n_webhook.receive endpoint.

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: No campaign financing gazette notices found this cycle — only campaign fund reports, spending disclosures, and donor declarations are collected

json.data:
GAZETTE NOTICE NO. 2847 OF 2026

THE ELECTION CAMPAIGN FINANCING ACT, 2013 (No. 42 of 2013)

CAMPAIGN SPENDING RETURNS — 2027 GENERAL ELECTION

IN EXERCISE of the powers conferred by Section 24 of the Election Campaign Financing Act, 2013, the Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission hereby publishes the following campaign spending returns filed for the 2027 General Election cycle.

1. PRESIDENTIAL CANDIDATES

Candidate: Raila Amolo Odinga
Party: Orange Democratic Movement (ODM)
Total Contributions Declared: KES 4,200,000,000
Total Expenditure Declared: KES 5,280,000,000
Spending Limit: KES 4,000,000,000
Compliance Status: EXCEEDED — Referred to DPP under Section 43

Candidate: William Samoei Ruto
Party: United Democratic Alliance (UDA)
Total Contributions Declared: KES 3,800,000,000
Total Expenditure Declared: KES 3,800,000,000
Spending Limit: KES 4,000,000,000
Compliance Status: WARNING — At 95% of limit

2. GUBERNATORIAL CANDIDATES — NAIROBI COUNTY

Candidate: Johnson Arthur Sakaja
Party: United Democratic Alliance (UDA)
Total Contributions Declared: KES 520,000,000
Total Expenditure Declared: KES 515,000,000
Spending Limit: KES 500,000,000
Compliance Status: EXCEEDED — Referred to DPP under Section 43

NOTE: Candidates who have not filed returns are in violation of Section 24 and are liable to the penalties prescribed in Section 43. The Commission shall transmit a full report to the Director of Public Prosecutions.

Dated the 5th March, 2026

WAFULA CHEBUKATI
Chairperson, IEBC
